NJ Spotlight News

Clip: 8/9/2024 | 1m 30sVideo hasClosed Captions|CC

NJ natives racked up multiple gold, silver and bronze medals

At the end of the week, the USA team reached the 100-medal mark, the most of any nation competing. The Garden State made a name for itself at the 2024 Summer Olympics, with seven New Jersey natives or residents racking up multiple gold, silver and bronze medals -- and one even making history.

08/09/2024

and finally tonight Jersey has made a name for itself at the 2024 Paris Olympics racking up multiple gold medals numerous silver and bronze athletes from the Garden State are owning their Sport and making history too Central jerseys Phenom Sydney mclaughin levrone setting a new world record in her signature event the 400 meter hurdles obliterating her competition to reclaim her seat as track royalty crossing the Finish line and get this 50.37951 bringing home a silver medal and who can forget Team USA Gymnastics Oradell's Hezly Rivera made her Olympics debut this year at just 16 years old performing in the qualifying rounds to help Team USA secure a spot in the team finals and then bringing home the gold alongside the goat Simone biles incredible [Music]
